issues.observed_evidence: Current course has ~240 exam concepts across 52 sections. V3 requires 416 subtopics (8 per section × 52) with 3 variants each = 1248 total.
issues.expected: 416 subtopics, 1248 exam variants per V3 invariant vector
issues.root_cause: V2 structure used 3-5 concepts per section; V3 mandates 8 (4 topics × 2 subtopics)
issues.impact: Sections do not meet V3 counting contract. Current content is a starting point, not the final target.
issues.fix: Multi-session effort: expand each section from current concept count to 8 subtopics. Prioritize by section order S1→S52.
verification: Count subtopics per section in section files

issues.observed_evidence: Existing course has 4 capstones (S13, S26, S39, S51). V3 requires 13 (12 level + 1 final) with gates at S4/S8/S13/S17/S21/S26/S30/S34/S39/S43/S47/S51/S52.
issues.expected: 13 capstones with defined gates and evidence requirements
issues.root_cause: V2 consolidated capstones to 4; V3 distributes them across 12 gates + 1 final
issues.impact: 9 capstone gates are missing (S4, S8, S17, S21, S30, S34, S43, S47, S52-FINAL). Students don't have intermediate project milestones.
issues.fix: Create capstone increment specifications for each of the 9 missing gates. Map to existing section content.
verification: Each capstone has gate_section, evidence_required, state

issues.observed_evidence: Current sections have varying exercise counts (typically 3-5 per section). V3 requires 24 per section (3 per subtopic × 8 subtopics).
issues.impact: Insufficient practice opportunities for mastery learning
issues.fix: Expand exercises as subtopics are expanded (linked to GLOBAL-V3-001)

issues.observed_evidence: V3 roadmap states S01 state as 'BLOCKED_PLATFORM; contenido candidato'
issues.expected: Platform must be auditable and functional before S01 can reach RELEASED
issues.root_cause: V3 was written before the current Next.js platform was built. Platform now exists but hasn't been formally audited against V3 criteria.
issues.impact: S01 cannot progress to RELEASED without platform audit
issues.fix: Run platform audit (PHASE 1 inventory) against V3 criteria. Document results in issue_registry.
verification: All V3 platform requirements verified or issues opened

issues.observed_evidence: V3 mandates: 'Coincidir en apellido, teléfono, email, dirección, distancia o transacciones es evidencia para revisión, no prueba de parentesco, colusión o fraude. Entity resolution, relationship evidence y risk triage son capas separadas.'
issues.expected: All content involving entity resolution, matching, or relationship scoring must clearly separate these three layers
issues.root_cause: Existing content (especially S22 rapidfuzz-entity) may conflate matching with relationship inference
issues.impact: Privacy/ethics violation risk if content implies that matching = fraud detection
issues.fix: Audit all sections touching entity resolution, matching, or scoring. Ensure 3-layer separation is explicit.
verification: Audit S22, S13, S30, S31, S34, S39, S52 for 3-layer separation
